title: Design Decisions Log
summary: Chronological log of nine material design decisions (D-001 through D-009) covering tiering, questionnaire patterns, API strategy, MCP integration, project structure, and credential handling.
scope: Network Integration API as primary path
notes: Manifest-declared ADR; content confirms — document is a multi-decision log with Context/Decision/Consequences/Status structure per entry. All nine decisions carry Status: Active, treated as Accepted/locked. Aggregate ADR (multiple decisions in one file) rather than per-decision files.
